title: Blood Toll
text: The gate demands a price before opening. Dungeon Score +1.
win: Draw 1 Elemental Power and gain 1 gold.
lose: Draw 1 Curse and discard 1 troop from your hand.

title: Open Seal
text: A seal has already cracked. Dungeon Score -1.
win: Draw 1 Elemental Power and draw 1 Bonus.

title: Demon Captain
text: A named demon commands the threshold. Dungeon Score +2.
win: Draw 1 Elemental Power and gain 1 Mastery.
lose: Draw 1 Curse, discard 1 troop, and lose 1 gold if able.

title: False Echo
text: The gate imitates voices you trust. No score change.
lose: Draw 1 Curse and discard 1 random card.
